chain.thought: Explanation: The games that went into overtime are identified by "(ot)" in the result column. This occurs in row 13 (26-23 (ot)) and row 14 (30-24 (ot)). Therefore, there were 2 overtime games between the Eagles and Giants.

- 2006-09-17: New York Giants 30-24 (ot) vs Philadelphia Eagles
